title: telemetry-logs — field classification
description: Every log record field classified. Redaction targets restricted + regulated tiers.

regulated_minor: Any log record referencing a minor's user_id must be redacted per COPPA / GDPR Art. 8
regulated_financial: Never logged: PAN, CVV, expiry, full card number — redactor patterns catch anything matching card-number regex.

notes: Redaction is fail-safe: unknown keys are kept, but if a rule flags a value, the field is replaced with `[REDACTED]`. Better to have too aggressive redaction than a leak.
In dev, config('telemetry-logs.redact.pii_in_dev')=false keeps emails + phones readable for debugging. Never set to false in production.
IP addresses: redacted in production (GDPR personal data), kept in dev + staging.
